title: tilia rubra var. dasystyla
intro: Tilia rubra var. dasystyla, also known as the small-leaved lime or dasystyle small-leaved lime, is a deciduous tree species belonging to the Tilia genus. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic effects. It has been traditionally used to treat various health issues, such as anxiety, insomnia, and digestive problems, due to its calming and soothing effects. The leaves and flowers of the Tilia rubra var. dasystyla are often used in herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to reap its health benefits.
